introSection: Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on November 14, 2024.

On July 17, 2025, groundworks began.

On July 26, 2025, the park shared an update via email stating that the opening had been pushed back to "beyond 2026".

On November 28, 2025, what are presumed to be supports for the ride were photographed at the park and shared online.

The first track piece arrived on February 18, 2026.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on November 14, 2024.

On July 17, 2025, groundworks began.

On July 26, 2025, the park shared an update via email stating that the opening had been pushed back to "beyond 2026".

On November 28, 2025, what are presumed to be supports for the ride were photographed at the park and shared online.

The first track piece arrived on February 18, 2026.
